name: Bean Burritos with Salsa Mexicana
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the dried pinto beans according to package instructions.
2. Dice the onions into small pieces.
3. Combine the cooked beans and diced onions in a bowl.
4. If desired, add salt for seasoning.
5. Warm the flour tortillas on each side of a griddle or in a pan until soft and pliable.
6. Assemble the burritos by spreading the bean and onion mixture onto each tortilla.
7. Fold the sides and roll tightly to enclose the filling.
8. Place the assembled burritos on a serving plate.
9. Turn off the heat source when finished cooking.
